text: Compliance Star Award — recognised for the quality and strategic value of a high-sensitivity sanctions nexus investigation at Binance CIFC. Internal recognition for analytical depth and impact on risk decisions.

Post-seizure Solana asset tracing at NZ Police — traced and recovered 12k USD from a staking account following criminal seizure. Investigation conducted to law enforcement evidential standards supporting civil proceedings.

Large-scale internal intelligence briefing on Huione, Xinbi, and Southeast Asian illicit payment ecosystems — elevated team-wide awareness of APAC cybercrime financial infrastructure. Delivered to the full CIFC intelligence function.

External speaker at TRM Customer Connect webinar (Jun 2025) — 'Intelligence Fusion, Typology Building, and Service Risk Assessments.' Practitioner voice to TRM's global customer base. Guest lecturer, University of Waikato, 2023.

Multiple blacklist submissions and active fund tracking support — exploit and fraud investigations resulting in address-level action with security team coordination. Intelligence directly informed operational response.

VARA regulatory intelligence reporting support and LE-aligned intelligence packages — produced to evidential and regulatory standards, supporting external dissemination pathways and legal scrutiny requirements.
